expectations.text: Umbrella test (tests/umbrella.py) ends GREEN after the cascade completes
expectations.evidence: Real pytest run on mock-project-with-baseline: 1 passed in 0.01s.

expectations.text: Exactly 2 leaf briefs were written to .swarm/briefs/ (leaf-01 and leaf-02 or similar)
Per-leaf failing test files were written by the overlord at the paths declared in each brief
expectations.evidence: Legacy convention: leaves write their own tests (briefs instruct each leaf to write both test_file and impl_file). Test files were authored inside the leaf sub-agent runs, not by the overlord during decomposition.

expectations.text: Every overlord-written per-leaf test file begins with '# spec: ...::AC-N' header (Spec Link Rule)
expectations.evidence: Headers exist ('# spec: specs/url_utils.md::AC-1', '# spec: specs/url_utils.md::AC-2') but only have 2 '::' segments; the new Spec Link Rule regex (^#\s*spec:\s*\S+::\S+::AC-\d+) requires 3 — section + AC-N. Legacy cascade did not enforce this rule.

expectations.text: parse_url impl was admitted (NotImplementedError replaced with real code in src/url_utils/)
expectations.evidence: src/url_utils/parse_url.py exists; types.py rewired by parent via accepted contract-proposal.

expectations.text: .swarm/wave-NN.SWEEP.md was written by Phase 5 aggregate assumption-sweep
Cascade completed in one invocation — no chain of separate slash commands required by the user (unified skill only). N/A for baseline.
expectations.evidence: Legacy cascade requires 4 sequential slash commands: /swarm → /swarm-spawn → /swarm-review → /swarm-post-review. Eval sub-agent simulated each in sequence. This assertion is definitionally false for the baseline.

expectations.text: Neither leaf wrote outside its impl_files declaration (no edits to tests/umbrella.py, no edits to src/url_utils/types.py contract)
expectations.evidence: Brief 'do_not_edit' included types.py + umbrella.py; both untouched directly. types.py rewiring done by parent via accepted proposal — same outcome path as unified's conftest workaround.
